zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas le Blount - First Lord Blount於1260年出生在英國英格蘭盧特藍德貝爾頓 在 盧特藍德時，他的父親Sir Ralph le Blount - Lord of Belton31歲，母親Cicely Alicia Lovet31歲。他於1294年與Mrs Thomas Le Blount在英國英格蘭盧特藍德貝爾頓 在 盧特藍德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1328年8月17日在他的家鄉享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas le Blount - First Lord Blount于1260年出生在英国英格兰盧特藍德貝爾頓 在 盧特藍德时，他的父亲Sir Ralph le Blount - Lord of Belton31岁，母亲Cicely Alicia Lovet31岁。他于1294年与Mrs Thomas Le Blount在英国英格兰盧特藍德貝爾頓 在 盧特藍德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1328年8月17日在他的家乡享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: Blount
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Blunt
meanings: English: nickname for someone with fair hair or a light complexion, from Old French blund, blond (from Latin blondus) ‘blond, fair, yellow-haired’, used also of complexion.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: le
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas le Blount - First Lord Blount was born in 1260, in Belton In Rutland, Rutland, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Ralph le Blount - Lord of Belton, was 31 and his mother, Cicely Alicia Lovet, was 31. He married Mrs Thomas Le Blount in 1294, in Belton In Rutland, Rutland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 17 August 1328, in his hometown, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas le Blount - First Lord Blount est né en 1260, à Belton In Rutland, Rutland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Ralph le Blount - Lord of Belton, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Cicely Alicia Lovet, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Mrs Thomas Le Blount en 1294, à Belton In Rutland, Rutland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 17 août 1328, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 68 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas le Blount - First Lord Blount è nato il nel 1260 nel Belton In Rutland, Rutland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Ralph le Blount - Lord of Belton, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Cicely Alicia Lovet, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Mrs Thomas Le Blount nel 1294, nel Belton In Rutland, Rutland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 17 agosto 1328, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas le Blount - First Lord Blountが1260年にイギリスイギリスルトランドベルトン イン ルトランドで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph le Blount - Lord of Beltonは31歳，母Cicely Alicia Lovetは31歳であった。1294年にイギリスイギリスルトランドベルトン イン ルトランドでMrs Thomas Le Blountと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1328年8月17日に故郷で68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas le Blount - First Lord Blount(이)가 1260년 영국 잉글랜드 루틀랜드 벨턴 인 루틀랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Ralph le Blount - Lord of Belton(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Cicely Alicia Lovet(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1294년 영국 잉글랜드 루틀랜드 벨턴 인 루틀랜드에서 Mrs Thomas Le Blount(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1328년 8월 17일 그의 고향에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas le Blount - First Lord Blount nasceu em 1260, em Belton In Rutland, Rutland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Ralph le Blount - Lord of Belton, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Cicely Alicia Lovet, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs Thomas Le Blount em 1294, em Belton In Rutland, Rutland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 17 de agosto de 1328, em sua cidade natal, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas le Blount - First Lord Blount родился в 1260 г. в местности белтон ин рутланд, рутланд, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Ralph le Blount - Lord of Belton было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Cicely Alicia Lovet, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Thomas Le Blount в 1294 г. в местности белтон ин рутланд, рутланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 17 августа 1328 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas le Blount - First Lord Blount nació en 1260, en Belton In Rutland, Rutland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Ralph le Blount - Lord of Belton, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Cicely Alicia Lovet, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Mrs Thomas Le Blount en 1294, en Belton In Rutland, Rutland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 17 de agosto de 1328, en su pueblo, a la edad de 68 años.
